hero.headline: Pure water, engineered for quiet luxury.
hero.subtext: Aqua Nord brings precise Nordic filtration into refined homes, balancing measurable purity with calm, minimal design.

features.title: Arctic carbon core
features.description: Multi-stage carbon filtration removes chlorine, sediment, and micro-particles while preserving a clean mineral profile.

features.title: Continuous purity sensing
features.description: Inline sensors monitor water quality in real time and alert you before performance drops.

features.title: Low-waste flow design
features.description: A pressure-balanced system minimizes wastewater without compromising taste or throughput.

cta.headline: Bring Nordic-grade water into your home.
cta.subtext: Start with a source-water analysis and receive a discreet system plan built around your space, pressure, and taste profile.
